title: mentha canadensis var. piperascens
intro: Mentha canadensis var. piperascens, also known as American peppermint or Piperita, is a natural hybrid of peppermint (Mentha x piperita) and spearmint (Mentha spicata). It is a perennial herb native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of American peppermint include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to alleviate stress and anxiety. American peppermint can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural medicine.
